# Christophe VG

> Personal website of Christophe Van Ginneken (Christophe VG), Enterprise Architect from Belgium, specializing in software architecture, technology consulting, and digital transformation.

This site hosts my portfolio, professional articles, cooking recipes, sailing adventures, photography, and technology projects.

## About

- [About Me](https://christophe.vg/about/): Professional background, experience as Enterprise Architect, and personal interests
- [FAQ](https://christophe.vg/about/faq/): Frequently asked questions about services, approach, background, and collaboration
- [I, Enterprise Architect](https://christophe.vg/about/I-Enterprise-Architect): My role and approach as an Enterprise Architect realizing customers' dreams
- [My Agentic Workflow](https://christophe.vg/about/agentic-workflow/): How I work with AI agents—principles, approach, and transparency practices
- [Hello Agents](https://christophe.vg/about/hello-agents/): The story of my journey into agentic workflows over the first three months
- [Coding Agent & LLM Collaboration](https://christophe.vg/about/coding-agent/): Website-specific details on AI usage for this site
- [Problem Seeker](https://christophe.vg/about/problem-seeker/): My approach to finding and solving problems
- [Virtue of Technology Agnosticism](https://christophe.vg/about/virtue-of-technology-agnosticism/): Why technology-agnostic thinking matters in architecture

## Projects

- [Makes](https://christophe.vg/makes/): Maker and DIY projects, including electronics, 3D printing, and creative builds
- [Technology](https://christophe.vg/technology/): Technical articles on software development, architecture, and engineering practices

## Cooking (Koken)

> 185 recipes in Dutch covering appetizers, main courses, desserts, and more.

- [All Recipes](https://christophe.vg/koken/): Complete recipe collection (Dutch)
- Popular: Gegrilde Heilbot met Sauce Vierge, Tomaatjes uit de Oven met Geitenkaas, Thais Kokossoepje
- Categories: Appetizers, Main courses, Side dishes, Desserts, Sauces
- Note: Content is in Dutch (Nederlands)

## Sailing (Zeilen)

> 20 years of sailing logbooks documenting trips to Texel and Dutch waters.

- [Sailing Logbooks](https://christophe.vg/zeilen/): Trip reports and adventures (Dutch)
- Coverage: 2004-2025, primarily sailing around Texel and the Dutch coast
- Note: Content is in Dutch (Nederlands)

## Interests

- [Fotografie](https://christophe.vg/fotografie/): Photography portfolio and projects

## Music

- [Muziek](https://christophe.vg/about/muziek/): Favorite songs and music reviews with personal commentary

## Markdown Versions

Clean markdown versions of key pages are available for LLM consumption:

- [About (markdown)](https://christophe.vg/md/about/index.md): Professional profile and background
- [FAQ (markdown)](https://christophe.vg/md/about/faq.md): Frequently asked questions
- [I, Enterprise Architect (markdown)](https://christophe.vg/md/about/I-Enterprise-Architect.md): Architecture philosophy and approach
- [My Agentic Workflow (markdown)](https://christophe.vg/md/about/agentic-workflow.md): AI collaboration principles and practices
- [Problem Seeker (markdown)](https://christophe.vg/md/about/problem-seeker.md): Problem-seeking approach

## Optional

- [All Tags](https://christophe.vg/tags/): Content organized by topic tags
- [Leadership 101](https://christophe.vg/about/leadership-101/): Notes on engineering leadership
- [50 Shades of Ceremony](https://christophe.vg/about/50-shades-of-ceremony/): Thoughts on agile ceremonies and meeting practices
